news.headline: Webinar on loss trends in cyber insurance now available, focuses on cyber incidents & insurance adaptations.
news.summary: A complimentary webinar titled “Loss Trends in Cyber Liability Insurance” was hosted by AM Best and sponsored by Munich Re US. The video playback of the webinar is now accessible online. During the one-hour session, a panel consisting of legal and cyber insurance experts delved into analyzing the frequency, severity, and characteristics of cyber incidents such as data breaches, ransomware attacks, and other digital threats. The discussion also covered insights on how insurers are adjusting coverage models, pricing strategies, and response mechanisms in the face of evolving cyber risks.

news.headline: AuditBoard wins “Overall Risk Management Solution of the Year” in 2024 CyberSecurity Breakthrough Awards, 8th annual event.
news.summary: AuditBoard, a cloud-based platform specializing in audit, risk, compliance, and ESG management, has recently been acknowledged in the 8th edition of the CyberSecurity Breakthrough Awards. The platform was honored with the title of "Overall Risk Management Solution of the Year" in this renowned program. The CyberSecurity Breakthrough Awards spotlight cutting-edge information security innovations and organizations that demonstrate excellence in cybersecurity and risk management technology solutions on a global scale. This recognition further solidifies AuditBoard's position as a leader in the industry.

news.headline: Belgian law requires Ontex Group NV to disclose significant shareholdings received by notification on October 16, 2024.
news.summary: As per the Belgian Law of May 2, 2007, Ontex Group NV has disclosed a notification of significant shareholdings received on October 16, 2024, in compliance with Article 14. This notification pertains to the disclosure of significant shareholdings in listed companies as required by the law.

news.headline: OISTE Foundation sponsors Vargas Llosa Chair at IV Annual Conference "A Gathering for Culture in Freedom".
news.summary: The OISTE Foundation has become the Gold Sponsor of the Vargas Llosa Chair at the IV Annual Conference "A Gathering for Culture in Freedom." This sponsorship reflects the foundation's support for cultural events, with this particular conference being a significant platform for discussing freedom in culture. The Vargas Llosa Chair aims to promote cultural dialogue and exchange, and with OISTE Foundation's sponsorship, the conference can continue its mission.

news.headline: AFL self-certifies compliance with BABA Act, key supplier for BEAD Program broadband projects.
news.summary: AFL, a prominent fiber optic cables, connectivity, and equipment manufacturer, based in Spartanburg, South Carolina, has officially self-certified its products to comply with the Build America, Buy America (BABA) Act regulations. This important certification now establishes AFL as a vital supplier for broadband infrastructure initiatives supported by the Broadband Equity, Access, and Deployment (BEAD) Program. The BEAD Program falls under the administration of the National Telecommunications and Information Administration, emphasizing the significance of AFL's compliance for eligibility in contributing to projects under BEAD.

news.headline: Elevance Health Inc. reported Q3 earnings, with $44.7 billion revenues and $1.02 billion profit, missing expectations.
news.summary: Elevance Health Inc. (NYSE:ELV) recently reported its third-quarter earnings, falling short of expectations. The company recorded revenues of $44.7 billion, marking a 5.3% increase from the previous year and surpassing the anticipated $43.33 billion. Despite this revenue growth, profits decreased by 21% to $1.02 billion, translating to $4.36 per share. Adjusted earnings per share also took a hit, decreasing to $8.37 from $8.99 year-over-year, missing the expected $9.66. The company expressed confidence in its various business segments' long-term earning potential amid a challenging operating environment and unique obstacles in the Medicaid sector. Stay informed with more details on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Becky Axilbund of Main Street Middletown wins 2024 Preservation Maryland award for historic preservation work.

news.headline: Standard Group enhances printing services with new Fuji J Press 750, combining precision of offset with efficiency of digital inkjet.

news.headline: Free webinar by Xtalks and Evidation explores real-world data on depression from 54,000+ individuals, revolutionizing research.
news.summary: Join our upcoming webinar to explore the impact of real-world data on improving our comprehension of depression and enhancing patient-centered research and care. Gain insights into the advantages of gathering active and passive real-world data over time from over 54,000 individuals diagnosed with depression. This comprehensive dataset proves invaluable in advancing our knowledge of depression and in guiding more personalized treatment approaches.

news.headline: Poly AI is a top AI chatbot offering free, private, unrestricted conversations with 10 million characters, ranked TOP50 by A16Z.

news.headline: Atlanta Beltline appoints Amina Cooper as its first Director of Arts and Culture, beginning a new era after 15 years.
news.summary: A new era has commenced for the 15-year-old Beltline program in Atlanta, as Amina Cooper steps in as its inaugural Director of Arts and Culture. This appointment marks a significant milestone for the organization. The announcement was made on October 18, 2024, and has garnered attention as a major development for Atlanta Beltline, Inc. Cooper, a seasoned arts leader, will be at the helm of this program, bringing a wealth of experience to the table in guiding its future endeavors.

news.headline: APS launches UPRT program for Citation Jet Pilots with integrated training for CJP members at NBAA-BACE 2024.
news.summary: APS has launched a specialized Upset Prevention and Recovery Training (UPRT) program tailored for members of the Citation Jet Pilots (CJP) Association. The program includes academic training, hands-on experience with piston and jet aircraft, advanced simulation, and virtual elements. The initiative aims to enhance safety and proficiency for participating pilots.

news.headline: Viiz partners with Consumer Cellular for monitoring services for IRIS Ally Medical Alert device, aiming to assist the 30% of 56 million seniors in U.S. facing personal emergencies yearly.
news.summary: In 2023, the United States had around 56 million senior citizens aged 65 and above. About 30% of these individuals face personal emergencies such as accidents, falls, or medical events each year.

news.headline: Montana island with lake monster legend for sale with an unfinished mansion. Cromwell Island and mansion on sell.
news.summary: Rumors swirl around Flathead Lake in Montana, where the elusive water creature known as Flessie, adorned with deer antlers, allegedly resides. A unique opportunity presents itself as Cromwell Island, along with an unfinished mansion located at the lake's central island, is up for sale. This property is currently being highlighted on TopTenRealEstateDeals.com. The attraction is drawing attention, with interested buyers exploring the potential investment. The news broke on October 18 in Pompano Beach, Florida.

news.headline: Trill and Viros partner to empower indie artists with global platform; enhancing fan engagement and industry opportunities.
news.summary: Today, Trill, a platform facilitating direct connections between fans and celebrities for a mutually beneficial exchange, and Viros, an entertainment company creating a global venue platform and resource ecosystem to support independent artists, revealed a strategic collaboration. This partnership intends to capitalize on the strengths of both entities to enhance opportunities for artists and fans alike. The collaboration aims to leverage Trill's user base of X million fans and X thousand celebrities alongside Viros’ global platform of X venues to create a comprehensive and supportive environment for independent artists worldwide.
